title.en: 2 Bedroom Condo for sale at RHYTHM Ekkamai
title.zh: 2 Bedroom Condo for sale at RHYTHM Ekkamai
title.th: 2 Bedroom Condo for sale at RHYTHM Ekkamai

summary.zh: 出售：2卧，70㎡，10,416,000 泰铢。来源 DotProperty #fddb76ddb67e-e510-2192-de2e-03b6c089。
summary.th: ขาย: 2 นอน 70 ตร.ม. ราคา 10,416,000 บาท (DotProperty #fddb76ddb67e-e510-2192-de2e-03b6c089)

description.en:
Experience refined city living at Rhythm Ekkamai, a premium high-rise condo in the heart of Ekkamai-Sukhumvit 63, one of Bangkok’s most desirable lifestyle districts. This 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom corner unit offers 69.51 sqm of well-planned living space on the 7th floor, ideal for those who want comfort, privacy, and everyday convenience in one address.
The corner layout gives the unit a more private residential feel, while the garden view adds a calmer atmosphere rarely found in central Bangkok. The home includes air conditioning, a private balcony, covered parking, and a reserved parking spot, making it practical for both city living and long-term ownership.Why This Unit Stands Out

2BR/70sqm—lowest price in the building!  
-30.89% Below Market Price
Luxury high-rise condominium.- just 280 meters from BTS Ekkamai  
Prime Ekkamai location near BTS and Sukhumvit
10-Floor Sky Facilities: Features high-end amenities spread across 10 floors, including an Infinity Edge Pool, Sky Lounge, and a Floating Lobby

Property Details

2 Bedrooms | 2 Bathrooms
69.51 sqm corner unit
7th floor with garden view
Private balcony
Air conditioning
Covered parking with reserved parking spot

Nearby Locati
